query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `contacts` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`dealershipId` int NOT NULL,
	`firstName` varchar(100),
	`lastName` varchar(100),
	`title` varchar(100),
	`email` varchar(320),
	`phone` varchar(30),
	`preferredContactMethod` varchar(20) DEFAULT 'Email',
	`bestTimeToReach` varchar(100),
	`notes` text,
	`lastContactedDatetime` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `contacts_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `visitLogs` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`dealershipId` int NOT NULL,
	`contactId` int,
	`datetime` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`outcome` varchar(50),
	`nextStep` varchar(20),
	`notes` text,
	`attachmentUrl` varchar(500),
	`createdById` int,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `visitLogs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `proposalInstances` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`dealershipId` int NOT NULL,
	`contactId` int,
	`createdDatetime` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`publicUrl` varchar(500),
	`generatedPdfUrl` varchar(500),
	`emailSubject` varchar(500),
	`emailBody` text,
	`sentDatetime` timestamp,
	`status` varchar(20) DEFAULT 'Draft',
	`emailProviderMessageId` varchar(255),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `proposalInstances_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `followUps` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`dealershipId` int NOT NULL,
	`contactId` int,
	`proposalInstanceId` int,
	`followUpNumber` int NOT NULL,
	`dueDate` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`status` varchar(20) DEFAULT 'Pending',
	`sentDatetime` timestamp,
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `followUps_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `dealershipGroups` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`groupName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `dealershipGroups_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

	`emailBody` text,

	`status` varchar(20) DEFAULT 'Draft',
	`emailProviderMessageId` varchar(255),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `followUps` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`dealershipId` int NOT NULL,

	`dueDate` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`status` varchar(20) DEFAULT 'Pending',
	`sentDatetime` timestamp,

	CONSTRAINT `followUps_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `dealershipGroups` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
